steps.title: Find the plural subject
steps.content: The subject of the blank is "behavioral economists," which is plural. The phrase "such as Gee, whose research focuses on charitable giving" is an intervening modifier; removing it gives the core structure "behavioral economists ______ that economic decision-making can be irrational."

steps.title: Reject singular verbs
steps.content: A uses the singular form "has contended." B uses the singular present-tense form "contends." C uses the singular progressive form "is contending." The plural subject requires the base present-tense verb form. The answer is D.
